name: GPTWork
description: Coordinate ChatGPT and Codex with encoded goals, readable goal files, conversation memory, hosted/SSH workspaces, tasks, bundles, and GitHub Issues sync. Path-based auth: the URL suffix (/dev-token) is used as the bearer token.
suggested_prompts: Turn this deployment request into a readable encoded goal and assign it to Codex
Create an encoded goal with preview_text and payload_base64 for Codex
Upload these deployment files as a zip bundle and attach them to a goal
Verify the Nginx setup on the test server and report findings
Show Codex goals with shared conversation context
Append progress to a Codex goal conversation
List Codex session metadata for June 2026
Check the status of my running tasks
Sync current tasks to GitHub Issues
